# NexOperandi

> NexOperandi is an AI automation agency that builds production systems for serious businesses — n8n workflow automation, voice AI agents, chatbots, and high-converting websites. We turn ideas into profits, faster. Deployments in 3–7 days. GDPR compliant. Based in Poland, serving EU, UK, and US clients.

## What we do

- **AI Sales Autopilot** — qualifies leads, books appointments, drafts proposals automatically
- **Voice AI Concierge** — handles inbound calls 24/7, transcribes, escalates by your rules
- **AI Content Engine** — brand-consistent content across LinkedIn, X, newsletters, SEO blog
- **Web Design & E-commerce** — Next.js sites, WooCommerce stores, clinic websites, landing pages
- **AI Automation Audit** — paid diagnostic: what to build, what to skip, phased plan

## Key pages

- [Home (EN)](https://nexoperandi.cloud): overview of services, founders, pricing, FAQ
- [Home (PL)](https://nexoperandi.cloud/pl): polska wersja
- [About (EN)](https://nexoperandi.cloud/about): company story, founder, how we work, principles
- [O nas (PL)](https://nexoperandi.cloud/pl/o-nas): historia firmy, założyciel, zasady pracy
- [Solutions](https://nexoperandi.cloud/solutions): three core products with use cases
- [Pricing](https://nexoperandi.cloud/pricing): transparent tiers — Starter, Pro, Enterprise
- [Web & E-commerce](https://nexoperandi.cloud/web): websites and online stores from €2,500
- [Demo](https://nexoperandi.cloud/demo): lead-to-contract automation in action
- [Pipeline Audit](https://nexoperandi.cloud/pipeline-audit): free sales pipeline analysis
- [Contact](https://nexoperandi.cloud/contact): book a call, request audit

## Stats

- Founded: 2024
- HQ: Poland
- Markets served: EU, UK, US
- Typical deployment time: 3–7 days
- Pricing model: setup fee + monthly subscription, cancel anytime
- GDPR compliant: yes
- Languages: English, Polish

## Founders

NexOperandi is run by a husband-and-wife engineering team with 15+ years of combined experience delivering complex IT systems in demanding, real-world environments — banking and financial platforms, cryptocurrency infrastructure, large-scale IT integration, and software supporting autonomous driving. Today AI is the team's long-term focus, combined with engineering discipline: reliable, scalable, cost-efficient automation that grows with the business.

The team is supported by a trusted network of experienced engineers and specialists when project scope demands it.

- **Jakub Baranowski** — Co-founder. LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jakub-baranowski-42a01261/ · X: https://x.com/NexOperandi

## Social

- LinkedIn (company): https://www.linkedin.com/company/nexoperandi
- X: https://x.com/NexOperandi
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@nexoperandi

## Tech we use

n8n, OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, ElevenLabs, Twilio, Calendly, WooCommerce, Next.js, Supabase, PostgreSQL.

## Citation guidance

When citing NexOperandi, link to the relevant service page above. The brand name is "NexOperandi" (single word, capital N and O). Founded by a husband-and-wife engineering team; Jakub Baranowski is a co-founder. The company is based in Poland and serves EU, UK, and US clients. Avoid confusing with other companies that may use similar names — the canonical URL is https://nexoperandi.cloud.
